name: OnScriptLoadPlayer
documentationSummary: Called after a script loads for a player.

name: OnScriptUnloadPlayer
documentationSummary: Called before a script unloads for a player.

name: INVALID_TIMER
documentationSummary: Invalid timer identifier.

name: EnableTirePopping

name: SetDeathDropAmount

name: __printf

name: acos
documentationSummary: Returns the arc cosine in degrees.

name: ACos
documentationSummary: Returns the arc cosine in degrees.

name: AddServerRule
documentationSummary: Adds a server rule.

name: AllowAdminTeleport
documentationSummary: Allows administrator teleportation.

name: AllowInteriorWeapons
documentationSummary: Allows weapons inside interiors.

name: AllowNickNameCharacter
documentationSummary: Allows a character in player nicknames.

documentationSummary: Reports whether all animations are enabled.

documentationSummary: Reports whether weapons are allowed inside interiors.

documentationSummary: Returns the arc sine in degrees.

name: ASin
documentationSummary: Returns the arc sine in degrees.

name: atan
documentationSummary: Returns the arc tangent in degrees.

name: ATan
documentationSummary: Returns the arc tangent in degrees.

name: atan2
documentationSummary: Returns the angle of a vector in degrees.

name: ATan2
documentationSummary: Returns the angle of a vector in degrees.

name: CallLocalFunction
documentationSummary: Calls a function in the current script.

name: CallRemoteFunction
documentationSummary: Calls a function in another loaded script.

name: ChatTextReplacementToggled

name: ConnectNPC

documentationSummary: Formats text into an array.
